comment: doby configuration template — copy to .dobyrc.json in your project root
comment_scan_dirs: List of directories to scan for code files. Paths are relative to project root.
comment_file_extensions: List of file extensions to include. Only these files will be mapped to documentation.
comment_plans_dir: Directory containing planning/architecture documentation (absolute or relative path)
comment_wiki_dir: Directory containing wiki/memory documentation (absolute or relative path)
comment_keyword_to_doc: Keyword-to-doc mapping (Tier 3). If a file's path contains any of these keywords, it maps to the corresponding doc. Keywords are extracted from file paths (split by / and _). Matches are case-insensitive. Example: 'src/auth/login.ts' contains 'auth' → maps to 'auth-system.md'
comment_directory_rules: Directory pattern-to-doc mapping (Tier 2). If a file path starts with any of these patterns, it maps to the corresponding doc. Use trailing /. Longest matching pattern wins. Example: 'src/auth/login.ts' starts with 'src/auth/' → maps to 'auth-system.md'
comment_exact_file_map: Exact file-to-doc mapping (Tier 1). Maps specific files to docs. Highest priority. Example: 'src/index.ts' → 'app-entry.md'
